name: Ballotine of Chicken with Black Truffle and Jus Gras
description: A luxurious Bresse chicken ballotine infused with black truffle, served with a rich jus gras made from roasted chicken bones, vegetables, and truffle. Elegant, earthy, and perfect for special occasions.
keywords: bresse chicken, chicken, ballotine, truffle, jus gras, gourmet, french

winePairings.name: White Burgundy (Mâcon-Villages)
winePairings.notes: Enough body for the jus; bright mineral notes for truffle.

winePairings.name: Montrachet Grand Cru
winePairings.notes: Benchmark pairing with truffle + luxurious poultry.

steps.instruction: Slice the cooked ballotine into thick medallions.
Spoon a generous amount of jus gras on the plate.
Arrange chicken slices on top. Garnish with micro herbs, truffle slices, or edible flowers if desired. Serve immediately.

ingredients.note: about 3–4 lbs, skin on.  If you cannot find a Bresse chicken, use a high quality whole chicken.  Boneless skin on chicken breasts may also be used if deboning a chicken is difficult

steps.instruction: Debone the chicken, keeping the skin intact to form a flat piece of meat.
steps.note: if using a chicken breast, butterfly andd flatten with a meat tenderizer.

steps.instruction: Prepare truffle butter: finely mince 50 g of truffle and mix with softened butter, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Spread truffle butter evenly over the flattened chicken. Place remaining truffle slices on top.
Roll chicken tightly and secure with kitchen twine or sausage netting.
Cook: either poach in a water bath at 160°F (70°C) for 30–40 min, or roast in oven at 350°C (180°C) for 35–45 min until internal temp reaches 150°F.
Remove from heat and rest 10 minutes before slicing carefully.

sub_recipes.name: Jus Gras (Rich Chicken and Truffle Sauce)

steps.instruction: Roast chicken bones, wings, and vegetables at 400°F (205°C) until browned (20–25 min).
steps.note: if using chicken breasts, skip this step.

steps.instruction: Deglaze pan with white wine and reduce by half.
Add chicken stock, simmer 20–30 min. Strain and reduce to concentrate flavor.
Off heat, whisk in cold butter cubes to emulsify.
Stir in finely diced black truffle and season to taste.
